metadata.reference: S. Sarkar, V. Gupta, M. Kumar, J. Schubert, P.T. Probst, J. Joseph, T.A.F. König. Hybridized guided-mode resonances via colloidal plasmonic self-assembled grating. ACS Appl. Mater. Interfaces, 11, 13752-13760 (2019) (Numerical data kindly provided by Dr. Tobias König)
metadata.comments: Titanium(IV) oxide (Titanium dioxide, TiO<sub>2</sub>) thin film (thickness 200 nm) on glass substrate.
